property.name: utcOffsetMinutes
property.label: UTC Offset Minutes
property.description: UTC offset in minutes based on browser locale.

property.name: currentLocalDateTime
property.label: Current Local Date Time
property.description: Current local date/time from browser in ISO-like format.

property.name: currentUtcDateTime
property.label: Current UTC Date Time
property.description: Current UTC timestamp from browser in ISO format.

property.name: captureOnLoad
property.label: Capture on Load
property.description: Automatically capture timezone when this screen loads.

property.name: inputTimezoneIana
property.label: Input Timezone (IANA)
property.description: Optional reactive input timezone from another component/field on the same screen.

property.name: apiKey
property.label: Google API Key (Optional)
property.description: Optional. Pass only if address lookup fails without a query key; prefer Named Credential.
